promoted_facts.fact: Hyatt Hotels Corporation portfolio: 1,442 hotels, 347,301 rooms, 79 countries as of Dec 31, 2024
promoted_facts.source: Reader report Pass A, bullet 2 + financial notes Note 1
Financial notes depth pass - cash flow statement

promoted_facts.fact: Share repurchases of $1,190M in 2024 ($453M in 2023, $369M in 2022)
promoted_facts.source: Financial notes depth pass - cash flow and equity statements
Financial notes depth pass - equity statement

promoted_facts.fact: Key money payments to customers: $153M (2024), $132M (2023), $165M (2022) — amortized to contra revenue over customer life
Revenue recognition: Initial franchise fees deferred and recognized over initial franchise agreement term
System-wide services operated under fund model, intended to break-even over time
Reservation length distribution: 82.8% for 1-4 nights, 13.9% for 5-11 nights, 2.4% for 12-29 nights, 0.9% for 30+ nights

promoted_facts.source: Financial notes depth pass - cash flow

promoted_facts.fact: Pre-existing Two Roads contracts may result in some Participating Hotels paying less for same System Services
promoted_facts.source: Reader report Pass C, Item 6 notes
